title: Humming Cable
body: A cable with a linear density of $$mu=0.02$$ $$\frac{kg}{m}$$ is hung from telephone poles. The tension in the cable is $$500.00$$ N. The distance between poles is $$20$$ meters. The wind blows across the line, causing the cable to resonate. A standing wave pattern is produced that has $$4.5$$ wavelengths between the two poles. The speed of sound at the current temperature $$T=20$$ degrees C is $$343.00$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$.
